/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/src/vulkan_app.cpp.o CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/src/imgui_layer.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_draw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_widgets.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/imgui_tables.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_glfw.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/vulkano_app.dir/_deps/imgui-src/backends/imgui_impl_vulkan.cpp.o" -o /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/vulkano_app  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libvulkan.dylib /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libglfw3.a /Users/bruno/Documents/Development/bruno/vulkano_codex/bin/libglm.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
